title: Advanced Lists
description: Learn to create unordered lists, nested ordered lists, and change their numbering.
instructions: Create a main unordered list item 'Apple' containing a nested unordered list with 'Red Apple' and 'Green Apple'. Then set the enum numbering to '1.a)'. Create an ordered list with the first item 'Fruits' containing a nested ordered list with items 'Citrus' and 'Berry', and a second main item 'Vegetables'.
hint: Use `-` for unordered lists. Use `#set enum(numbering: "1.a)")`. Use two spaces (or a tab) to indent nested list items.
